tEn: Large Scale GAN Training for High Fidelity Natural Image Synthesis
tZh: 大规模GAN训练实现高保真自然图像合成
sEn: BigGANs achieve state-of-the-art class-conditional image synthesis on ImageNet at 128x128 resolution with IS 166.5 and FID 7.4.
sZh: BigGAN在128x128分辨率的ImageNet上实现了类别条件图像合成的最新成果，IS达到166.5，FID为7.4。
absEn: Despite recent progress in generative image modeling, successfully generating high-resolution, diverse samples from complex datasets such as ImageNet remains an elusive goal. To this end, we train Generative Adversarial Networks at the largest scale yet attempted, and study the instabilities specific to such scale. We find that applying orthogonal regularization to the generator renders it amenable to a simple "truncation trick," allowing fine control over the trade-off between sample fidelity and variety by reducing the variance of the Generator's input. Our modifications lead to models which set the new state of the art in class-conditional image synthesis. When trained on ImageNet at 128x128 resolution, our models (BigGANs) achieve an Inception Score (IS) of 166.5 and Frechet Inception Distance (FID) of 7.4, improving over the previous best IS of 52.52 and FID of 18.6.
absZh: 尽管生成图像建模近期取得了进展，但从ImageNet等复杂数据集中成功生成高分辨率、多样化的样本仍然是一个难以实现的目标。为此，我们以前所未有的规模训练生成对抗网络，并研究了这种规模特有的不稳定性。我们发现，对生成器应用正交正则化使其适用于一种简单的“截断技巧”，通过降低生成器输入的方差，可以精细控制样本保真度和多样性之间的权衡。我们的改进使得模型在类别条件图像合成中达到了新的最优水平。在128x128分辨率的ImageNet上训练时，我们的模型（BigGANs）实现了166.5的初始分数（IS）和7.4的弗雷歇初始距离（FID），相比之前最优的IS 52.52和FID 18.6有了显著提升。

contrib.en: Demonstrated that GANs benefit dramatically from scaling, training models with 2-4x parameters and 8x batch size.
contrib.zh: 证明GAN从规模扩张中显著受益，训练了参数2-4倍、批量大小8倍的模型。

contrib.en: Introduced two simple architectural changes (shared embedding, skip-z) that improve scalability and performance.
contrib.zh: 引入两种简单架构变化（共享嵌入、跳跃连接z），提升可扩展性和性能。

contrib.en: Applied orthogonal regularization to the generator, enabling the truncation trick for fine control over fidelity-variety trade-off.
contrib.zh: 对生成器应用正交正则化，实现截断技巧以精细控制保真度与多样性权衡。

contrib.en: Discovered and characterized instabilities specific to large-scale GANs, linking them to spectral explosion in generator layers.
contrib.zh: 发现并刻画了大规模GAN特有的不稳定性，将其与生成器层的谱爆炸关联。

contrib.en: Achieved state-of-the-art Inception Score of 166.5 and FID of 7.4 on ImageNet 128x128, improving over previous best by large margins.
contrib.zh: 在ImageNet 128x128上实现166.5的Inception Score和7.4的FID，大幅超越此前最优。

contrib.en: Extended findings to JFT-300M dataset, showing design choices transfer and larger datasets may alleviate stability issues.
contrib.zh: 将发现扩展到JFT-300M数据集，表明设计选择可迁移，更大数据集可能缓解稳定性问题。

limits.en: Training collapse still occurs at large scale, requiring early stopping despite regularization.
limits.zh: 大规模训练仍会出现崩溃，尽管有正则化仍需早停。

limits.en: Stability can be enforced by strong constraints on discriminator, but at a dramatic cost to performance (e.g., 45% IS reduction).
limits.zh: 通过对判别器施加强约束可确保稳定，但性能代价巨大（如IS降低45%）。

limits.en: Truncation trick reduces sample variety; optimal threshold varies across datasets (e.g., JFT-300M vs ImageNet).
limits.zh: 截断技巧降低样本多样性；最优阈值因数据集而异（如JFT-300M vs ImageNet）。

limits.en: Discriminator memorizes training set (98% training accuracy vs 50-55% validation), limiting generalization.
limits.zh: 判别器记忆训练集（训练准确率98% vs 验证集50-55%），限制泛化。

limits.en: Model struggles with classes having less data or more structure (e.g., crowds vs dogs on ImageNet).
limits.zh: 模型在数据少或结构复杂的类别上表现不佳（如ImageNet上人群 vs 狗）。

items.en: Despite recent progress in generative image modeling, successfully generating high-resolution, diverse samples from complex datasets such as ImageNet remains an elusive goal. To this end, we train Generative Adversarial Networks at the largest scale yet attempted, and study the instabilities specific to such scale. We find that applying orthogonal regularization to the generator renders it amenable to a simple “truncation trick,” allowing fine control over the trade-off between sample fidelity and variety by reducing the variance of the Generator’s input. Our modifications lead to models which set the new state of the art in class-conditional image synthesis. When trained on ImageNet at 128×\times128 resolution, our models (BigGANs) achieve an Inception Score (IS) of 166.5 and Fréchet Inception Distance (FID) of 7.4, improving over the previous best IS of 52.52 and FID of 18.65.
items.zh: 尽管生成式图像建模近期取得了进展，但从ImageNet等复杂数据集中成功生成高分辨率、多样化的样本仍然是一个难以实现的目标。为此，我们训练了迄今为止规模最大的生成对抗网络，并研究了这种规模特有的不稳定性。我们发现，对生成器应用正交正则化使其适用于一种简单的“截断技巧”，通过降低生成器输入的方差，可以精细控制样本保真度与多样性之间的权衡。我们的改进使得模型在类条件图像合成中达到了新的最优水平。在128×128分辨率的ImageNet上训练时，我们的模型（BigGAN）实现了166.5的初始分数（IS）和7.4的Fréchet初始距离（FID），相比之前最优的IS 52.52和FID 18.65有了显著提升。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Class-conditional samples generated by our model.
items.capZh: 图1：我们的模型生成的类条件样本。

items.en: The state of generative image modeling has advanced dramatically in recent years, with Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs, Goodfellow et al. (2014)) at the forefront of efforts to generate high-fidelity, diverse images with models learned directly from data. GAN training is dynamic, and sensitive to nearly every aspect of its setup (from optimization parameters to model architecture), but a torrent of research has yielded empirical and theoretical insights enabling stable training in a variety of settings. Despite this progress, the current state of the art in conditional ImageNet modeling (Zhang et al., 2018) achieves an Inception Score (Salimans et al., 2016) of 52.5, compared to 233 for real data.
items.zh: 近年来，生成式图像建模的状态取得了显著进展，其中生成对抗网络（GANs, Goodfellow et al. (2014)）处于通过直接从数据学习模型来生成高保真、多样化图像的前沿。GAN训练是动态的，并且对其设置的几乎每个方面（从优化参数到模型架构）都很敏感，但大量的研究已经提供了经验和理论见解，使得在各种设置下实现稳定训练成为可能。尽管取得了这些进展，当前条件ImageNet建模的最优水平（Zhang et al., 2018）达到了52.5的初始分数（Salimans et al., 2016），而真实数据为233。

items.en: In this work, we set out to close the gap in fidelity and variety between images generated by GANs and real-world images from the ImageNet dataset. We make the following three contributions towards this goal:
items.zh: 在这项工作中，我们旨在缩小GAN生成的图像与ImageNet数据集中真实图像在保真度和多样性方面的差距。为此，我们做出了以下三个贡献：

items.en: We demonstrate that GANs benefit dramatically from scaling, and train models with two to four times as many parameters and eight times the batch size compared to prior art. We introduce two simple, general architectural changes that improve scalability, and modify a regularization scheme to improve conditioning, demonstrably boosting performance.
items.zh: 我们证明了GAN从规模扩张中获益显著，并训练了参数数量是先前工作的两到四倍、批量大小是八倍的模型。我们引入了两个简单、通用的架构改进以提高可扩展性，并修改了正则化方案以改善条件化，从而显著提升了性能。

items.en: As a side effect of our modifications, our models become amenable to the “truncation trick,” a simple sampling technique that allows explicit, fine-grained control of the trade-off between sample variety and fidelity.
items.zh: 作为我们修改的副作用，我们的模型适用于“截断技巧”，这是一种简单的采样技术，允许对样本多样性和保真度之间的权衡进行显式、精细的控制。

items.en: We discover instabilities specific to large scale GANs, and characterize them empirically. Leveraging insights from this analysis, we demonstrate that a combination of novel and existing techniques can reduce these instabilities, but complete training stability can only be achieved at a dramatic cost to performance.
items.zh: 我们发现了大规模GAN特有的不稳定性，并对其进行了经验性描述。利用这一分析的见解，我们证明了一种结合新颖和现有技术的方法可以减少这些不稳定性，但完全的训练稳定性只能以性能的巨大代价来实现。

items.en: Our modifications substantially improve class-conditional GANs. When trained on ImageNet at 128×\times128 resolution, our models (BigGANs) improve the state-of-the-art Inception Score (IS) and Fréchet Inception Distance (FID) from 52.52 and 18.65 to 166.5 and 7.4 respectively. We also successfully train BigGANs on ImageNet at 256×\times256 and 512×\times512 resolution, and achieve IS and FID of 232.5 and 8.1 at 256×\times256 and IS and FID of 241.5 and 11.5 at 512×\times512. Finally, we train our models on an even larger dataset – JFT-300M – and demonstrate that our design choices transfer well from ImageNet. Code and weights for our pretrained generators are publicly available 111https://tfhub.dev/s?q=biggan.
items.zh: 我们的修改显著改进了类条件GAN。在128×128分辨率的ImageNet上训练时，我们的模型（BigGAN）将最优初始分数（IS）和Fréchet初始距离（FID）从52.52和18.65分别提高到166.5和7.4。我们还成功地在256×256和512×512分辨率的ImageNet上训练了BigGAN，在256×256分辨率下实现了IS和FID分别为232.5和8.1，在512×512分辨率下实现了IS和FID分别为241.5和11.5。最后，我们在更大的数据集JFT-300M上训练了模型，并证明了我们的设计选择能够很好地从ImageNet迁移。预训练生成器的代码和权重已公开提供111https://tfhub.dev/s?q=biggan。

items.en: A Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) involves Generator (G) and Discriminator (D) networks whose purpose, respectively, is to map random noise to samples and discriminate real and generated samples. Formally, the GAN objective, in its original form (Goodfellow et al., 2014) involves finding a Nash equilibrium to the following two player min-max problem:
items.zh: 生成对抗网络（GAN）涉及生成器（G）和判别器（D）网络，其目的分别是将随机噪声映射到样本以及区分真实样本和生成样本。形式上，GAN目标在其原始形式（Goodfellow et al., 2014）中涉及找到以下两人极小极大问题的纳什均衡：

items.en: where 𝒛∈ℝdz𝒛superscriptℝsubscript𝑑𝑧{\bm{z}}\in\mathbb{R}^{d_{z}} is a latent variable drawn from distribution p​(𝒛)𝑝𝒛p({\bm{z}}) such as 𝒩​(0,I)𝒩0𝐼\mathcal{N}(0,I) or 𝒰​[−1,1]𝒰11\mathcal{U}[-1,1]. When applied to images, G and D are usually convolutional neural networks (Radford et al., 2016). Without auxiliary stabilization techniques, this training procedure is notoriously brittle, requiring finely-tuned hyperparameters and architectural choices to work at all.
items.zh: 其中𝒛∈ℝdz是从分布p(𝒛)（如𝒩(0,I)或𝒰[−1,1]）中抽取的潜变量。当应用于图像时，G和D通常是卷积神经网络（Radford et al., 2016）。没有辅助稳定技术时，这种训练过程非常脆弱，需要精细调整的超参数和架构选择才能工作。

items.en: Much recent research has accordingly focused on modifications to the vanilla GAN procedure to impart stability, drawing on a growing body of empirical and theoretical insights (Nowozin et al., 2016; Sønderby et al., 2017; Fedus et al., 2018). One line of work is focused on changing the objective function (Arjovsky et al., 2017; Mao et al., 2016; Lim & Ye, 2017; Bellemare et al., 2017; Salimans et al., 2018) to encourage convergence. Another line is focused on constraining D through gradient penalties (Gulrajani et al., 2017; Kodali et al., 2017; Mescheder et al., 2018) or normalization (Miyato et al., 2018), both to counteract the use of unbounded loss functions and ensure D provides gradients everywhere to G.
items.zh: 因此，许多近期研究集中于对原始GAN过程进行修改以提供稳定性，借鉴了日益增长的经验和理论见解（Nowozin et al., 2016; Sønderby et al., 2017; Fedus et al., 2018）。一条工作线专注于改变目标函数（Arjovsky et al., 2017; Mao et al., 2016; Lim & Ye, 2017; Bellemare et al., 2017; Salimans et al., 2018）以鼓励收敛。另一条工作线专注于通过梯度惩罚（Gulrajani et al., 2017; Kodali et al., 2017; Mescheder et al., 2018）或归一化（Miyato et al., 2018）来约束D，以抵消无界损失函数的使用，并确保D为G处处提供梯度。

items.en: Of particular relevance to our work is Spectral Normalization (Miyato et al., 2018), which enforces Lipschitz continuity on D by normalizing its parameters with running estimates of their first singular values, inducing backwards dynamics that adaptively regularize the top singular direction. Relatedly Odena et al. (2018) analyze the condition number of the Jacobian of G and find that performance is dependent on G’s conditioning. Zhang et al. (2018) find that employing Spectral Normalization in G improves stability, allowing for fewer D steps per iteration. We extend on these analyses to gain further insight into the pathology of GAN training.
items.zh: 与我们工作特别相关的是谱归一化（Miyato et al., 2018），它通过使用参数第一奇异值的运行估计来归一化参数，从而在D上强制执行Lipschitz连续性，并引入自适应正则化顶部奇异方向的反向动力学。相关地，Odena等人（2018）分析了G的雅可比矩阵的条件数，发现性能取决于G的条件化。Zhang等人（2018）发现，在G中使用谱归一化提高了稳定性，允许每次迭代减少D的步数。我们在这些分析的基础上进一步深入了解GAN训练的病态。

items.en: Other works focus on the choice of architecture, such as SA-GAN (Zhang et al., 2018) which adds the self-attention block from (Wang et al., 2018) to improve the ability of both G and D to model global structure. ProGAN (Karras et al., 2018) trains high-resolution GANs in the single-class setting by training a single model across a sequence of increasing resolutions.
items.zh: 其他工作关注架构选择，例如SA-GAN（Zhang et al., 2018），它添加了来自（Wang et al., 2018）的自注意力块，以提高G和D对全局结构建模的能力。ProGAN（Karras et al., 2018）通过在不断增加的分辨率序列上训练单个模型，在单类设置中训练高分辨率GAN。

items.en: In conditional GANs (Mirza & Osindero, 2014) class information can be fed into the model in various ways. In (Odena et al., 2017) it is provided to G by concatenating a 1-hot class vector to the noise vector, and the objective is modified to encourage conditional samples to maximize the corresponding class probability predicted by an auxiliary classifier. de Vries et al. (2017) and Dumoulin et al. (2017) modify the way class conditioning is passed to G by supplying it with class-conditional gains and biases in BatchNorm (Ioffe & Szegedy, 2015) layers. In Miyato & Koyama (2018), D is conditioned by using the cosine similarity between its features and a set of learned class embeddings as additional evidence for distinguishing real and generated samples, effectively encouraging generation of samples whose features match a learned class prototype.
items.zh: 在条件GAN（Mirza & Osindero, 2014）中，类信息可以以多种方式输入模型。在（Odena et al., 2017）中，通过将1-hot类向量与噪声向量拼接来提供给G，并修改目标以鼓励条件样本最大化由辅助分类器预测的相应类概率。de Vries等人（2017）和Dumoulin等人（2017）修改了类条件传递给G的方式，通过在BatchNorm（Ioffe & Szegedy, 2015）层中提供类条件的增益和偏置。在Miyato & Koyama（2018）中，D通过使用其特征与一组学习到的类嵌入之间的余弦相似度作为区分真实样本和生成样本的额外证据来进行条件化，从而有效鼓励生成与学习到的类原型匹配的样本。

items.en: Objectively evaluating implicit generative models is difficult (Theis et al., 2015). A variety of works have proposed heuristics for measuring the sample quality of models without tractable likelihoods (Salimans et al., 2016; Heusel et al., 2017; Bińkowski et al., 2018; Wu et al., 2017). Of these, the Inception Score (IS, Salimans et al. (2016)) and Fréchet Inception Distance (FID, Heusel et al. (2017)) have become popular despite their notable flaws (Barratt & Sharma, 2018). We employ them as approximate measures of sample quality, and to enable comparison against previous work.
items.zh: 客观评估隐式生成模型是困难的（Theis et al., 2015）。许多工作提出了衡量没有可处理似然的模型样本质量的启发式方法（Salimans et al., 2016; Heusel et al., 2017; Bińkowski et al., 2018; Wu et al., 2017）。其中，初始分数（IS, Salimans et al. (2016)）和Fréchet初始距离（FID, Heusel et al. (2017)）尽管存在明显缺陷（Barratt & Sharma, 2018），但已变得流行。我们将其用作样本质量的近似度量，并以便与先前工作进行比较。

items.en: In this section, we explore methods for scaling up GAN training to reap the performance benefits of larger models and larger batches. As a baseline, we employ the SA-GAN architecture of Zhang et al. (2018), which uses the hinge loss (Lim & Ye, 2017; Tran et al., 2017) GAN objective. We provide class information to G with class-conditional BatchNorm (Dumoulin et al., 2017; de Vries et al., 2017) and to D with projection (Miyato & Koyama, 2018). The optimization settings follow Zhang et al. (2018) (notably employing Spectral Norm in G) with the modification that we halve the learning rates and take two D steps per G step. For evaluation, we employ moving averages of G’s weights following Karras et al. (2018); Mescheder et al. (2018); Yazıcı et al. (2018), with a decay of 0.99990.99990.9999. We use Orthogonal Initialization (Saxe et al., 2014), whereas previous works used 𝒩​(0,0.02​I)𝒩00.02𝐼\mathcal{N}(0,0.02I) (Radford et al., 2016) or Xavier initialization (Glorot & Bengio, 2010). Each model is trained on 128 to 512 cores of a Google TPUv3 Pod (Google, 2018), and computes BatchNorm statistics in G across all devices, rather than per-device as is typical. We find progressive growing (Karras et al., 2018) unnecessary even for our 512×\times512 models. Additional details are in Appendix C.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们探索扩展GAN训练的方法，以从更大模型和更大批量中获得性能提升。作为基线，我们采用Zhang等人（2018）的SA-GAN架构，该架构使用铰链损失（Lim & Ye, 2017; Tran et al., 2017）GAN目标。我们通过类条件BatchNorm（Dumoulin et al., 2017; de Vries et al., 2017）向G提供类信息，并通过投影（Miyato & Koyama, 2018）向D提供类信息。优化设置遵循Zhang等人（2018）（特别是在G中使用谱范数），但我们将学习率减半，并每步G采取两步D。评估时，我们采用Karras等人（2018）；Mescheder等人（2018）；Yazıcı等人（2018）的G权重移动平均，衰减率为0.9999。我们使用正交初始化（Saxe et al., 2014），而先前工作使用𝒩(0,0.02I)（Radford et al., 2016）或Xavier初始化（Glorot & Bengio, 2010）。每个模型在Google TPUv3 Pod（Google, 2018）的128到512个核心上训练，并在所有设备上计算G中的BatchNorm统计量，而不是像通常那样按设备计算。我们发现渐进式增长（Karras et al., 2018）即使对于我们的512×512模型也是不必要的。其他细节见附录C。

items.en: We begin by increasing the batch size for the baseline model, and immediately find tremendous benefits in doing so. Rows 1-4 of Table 1 show that simply increasing the batch size by a factor of 8 improves the state-of-the-art IS by 46%. We conjecture that this is a result of each batch covering more modes, providing better gradients for both networks. One notable side effect of this scaling is that our models reach better final performance in fewer iterations, but become unstable and undergo complete training collapse. We discuss the causes and ramifications of this in Section 4. For these experiments, we report scores from checkpoints saved just before collapse.
items.zh: 我们首先增加基线模型的批量大小，并立即发现这样做带来了巨大的好处。表1的第1-4行显示，仅将批量大小增加8倍，就将最优IS提高了46%。我们推测这是因为每个批次覆盖了更多模式，为两个网络提供了更好的梯度。这种扩展的一个显著副作用是，我们的模型在更少的迭代次数内达到更好的最终性能，但变得不稳定并经历完全的训练崩溃。我们在第4节讨论其原因和后果。在这些实验中，我们报告了在崩溃前保存的检查点的分数。

items.en: We then increase the width (number of channels) in each layer by 50%, approximately doubling the number of parameters in both models. This leads to a further IS improvement of 21%, which we posit is due to the increased capacity of the model relative to the complexity of the dataset. Doubling the depth did not initially lead to improvement – we addressed this later in the BigGAN-deep model, which uses a different residual block structure.
items.zh: 然后，我们将每层的宽度（通道数）增加50%，使两个模型的参数数量大约翻倍。这导致IS进一步提高了21%，我们认为这是由于模型相对于数据集复杂度的容量增加所致。将深度加倍最初并未带来改进——我们后来在BigGAN-deep模型中解决了这个问题，该模型使用了不同的残差块结构。

items.en: We note that class embeddings c𝑐c used for the conditional BatchNorm layers in G contain a large number of weights. Instead of having a separate layer for each embedding (Miyato et al., 2018; Zhang et al., 2018), we opt to use a shared embedding, which is linearly projected to each layer’s gains and biases (Perez et al., 2018). This reduces computation and memory costs, and improves training speed (in number of iterations required to reach a given performance) by 37%. Next, we add direct skip connections (skip-z𝑧z) from the noise vector z𝑧z to multiple layers of G rather than just the initial layer. The intuition behind this design is to allow G to use the latent space to directly influence features at different resolutions and levels of hierarchy. In BigGAN, this is accomplished by splitting z𝑧z into one chunk per resolution, and concatenating each chunk to the conditional vector c𝑐c which gets projected to the BatchNorm gains and biases. In BigGAN-deep, we use an even simpler design, concatenating the entire z𝑧z with the conditional vector without splitting it into chunks. Previous works (Goodfellow et al., 2014; Denton et al., 2015) have considered variants of this concept; our implementation is a minor modification of this design. Skip-z𝑧z provides a modest performance improvement of around 4%, and improves training speed by a further 18%.
items.zh: 我们注意到，用于G中条件BatchNorm层的类嵌入c包含大量权重。我们没有为每个嵌入使用单独的层（Miyato et al., 2018; Zhang et al., 2018），而是选择使用共享嵌入，该嵌入被线性投影到每层的增益和偏置（Perez et al., 2018）。这减少了计算和内存成本，并将训练速度（达到给定性能所需的迭代次数）提高了37%。接下来，我们添加了从噪声向量z到G的多层（而非仅初始层）的直接跳跃连接（skip-z）。这一设计背后的直觉是允许G利用潜空间直接影响不同分辨率和层次级别的特征。在BigGAN中，这是通过将z拆分为每个分辨率一个块，并将每个块与条件向量c拼接来实现的，c被投影到BatchNorm增益和偏置。在BigGAN-deep中，我们使用了更简单的设计，将整个z与条件向量拼接而不拆分。先前的工作（Goodfellow et al., 2014; Denton et al., 2015）已经考虑过这一概念的变体；我们的实现是对此设计的微小修改。Skip-z提供了约4%的适度性能提升，并进一步将训练速度提高了18%。

full.sec: 3.1 Trading off variety and fidelity with the Truncation Trick
full.secZh: 3.1 用截断技巧权衡多样性与保真度

items.capEn: Figure 2: (a) The effects of increasing truncation. From left to right, the threshold is set to 2, 1, 0.5, 0.04. (b) Saturation artifacts from applying truncation to a poorly conditioned model.
items.capZh: 图2：(a) 增加截断的效果。从左到右，阈值设置为2、1、0.5、0.04。(b) 对条件化较差的模型应用截断产生的饱和伪影。

items.en: Unlike models which need to backpropagate through their latents, GANs can employ an arbitrary prior p​(z)𝑝𝑧p(z), yet the vast majority of previous works have chosen to draw z𝑧z from either 𝒩​(0,I)𝒩0𝐼\mathcal{N}(0,I) or 𝒰​[−1,1]𝒰11\mathcal{U}[-1,1]. We question the optimality of this choice and explore alternatives in Appendix E.
items.zh: 与需要通过潜在变量反向传播的模型不同，GAN 可以使用任意先验分布 p(z)，但绝大多数先前的工作都选择从 𝒩(0,I) 或 𝒰[-1,1] 中抽取 z。我们质疑这种选择的最优性，并在附录 E 中探索替代方案。

items.en: Remarkably, our best results come from using a different latent distribution for sampling than was used in training. Taking a model trained with z∼𝒩​(0,I)similar-to𝑧𝒩0𝐼z\sim\mathcal{N}(0,I) and sampling z𝑧z from a truncated normal (where values which fall outside a range are resampled to fall inside that range) immediately provides a boost to IS and FID. We call this the Truncation Trick: truncating a z𝑧z vector by resampling the values with magnitude above a chosen threshold leads to improvement in individual sample quality at the cost of reduction in overall sample variety. Figure 2(a) demonstrates this: as the threshold is reduced, and elements of z𝑧z are truncated towards zero (the mode of the latent distribution), individual samples approach the mode of G’s output distribution. Related observations about this trade-off were made in (Marchesi, 2016; Pieters & Wiering, 2014).
items.zh: 值得注意的是，我们最好的结果来自于使用与训练时不同的潜在分布进行采样。使用 z∼𝒩(0,I) 训练的模型，并从截断正态分布（其中超出范围的值被重新采样以落入该范围内）中采样 z，立即提升了 IS 和 FID。我们称之为截断技巧：通过重新采样幅度超过选定阈值的值来截断 z 向量，可以在牺牲整体样本多样性的情况下提高单个样本质量。图 2(a) 展示了这一点：随着阈值降低，z 的元素向零（潜在分布的模式）截断，单个样本趋近于 G 输出分布的模式。关于这种权衡的相关观察在 (Marchesi, 2016; Pieters & Wiering, 2014) 中也有提及。

items.en: This technique allows fine-grained, post-hoc selection of the trade-off between sample quality and variety for a given G. Notably, we can compute FID and IS for a range of thresholds, obtaining the variety-fidelity curve reminiscent of the precision-recall curve (Figure 17). As IS does not penalize lack of variety in class-conditional models, reducing the truncation threshold leads to a direct increase in IS (analogous to precision). FID penalizes lack of variety (analogous to recall) but also rewards precision, so we initially see a moderate improvement in FID, but as truncation approaches zero and variety diminishes, the FID sharply drops. The distribution shift caused by sampling with different latents than those seen in training is problematic for many models. Some of our larger models are not amenable to truncation, producing saturation artifacts (Figure 2(b)) when fed truncated noise. To counteract this, we seek to enforce amenability to truncation by conditioning G to be smooth, so that the full space of z𝑧z will map to good output samples. For this, we turn to Orthogonal Regularization (Brock et al., 2017), which directly enforces the orthogonality condition:
items.zh: 该技术允许对给定 G 的样本质量与多样性之间的权衡进行细粒度的事后选择。值得注意的是，我们可以计算一系列阈值下的 FID 和 IS，得到类似于精确率-召回率曲线的多样性-保真度曲线（图 17）。由于 IS 不惩罚类条件模型中多样性的缺乏，降低截断阈值直接导致 IS 增加（类似于精确率）。FID 惩罚多样性的缺乏（类似于召回率），但也奖励精确率，因此我们最初看到 FID 有适度改善，但随着截断接近零且多样性减少，FID 急剧下降。使用与训练中不同的潜在变量进行采样导致的分布偏移对许多模型来说是有问题的。我们的一些较大模型不适合截断，当输入截断噪声时会产生饱和伪影（图 2(b)）。为了应对这一点，我们试图通过使 G 平滑化来强制其对截断的适应性，以便整个 z 空间都能映射到良好的输出样本。为此，我们采用正交正则化 (Brock et al., 2017)，它直接强制正交条件：

items.en: where W𝑊W is a weight matrix and β𝛽\beta a hyperparameter. This regularization is known to often be too limiting (Miyato et al., 2018), so we explore several variants designed to relax the constraint while still imparting the desired smoothness to our models. The version we find to work best removes the diagonal terms from the regularization, and aims to minimize the pairwise cosine similarity between filters but does not constrain their norm:
items.zh: 其中 W 是权重矩阵，β 是超参数。已知这种正则化通常限制性太强 (Miyato et al., 2018)，因此我们探索了几种变体，旨在放松约束同时仍赋予模型所需的平滑性。我们发现效果最好的版本去除了正则化中的对角项，旨在最小化滤波器之间的成对余弦相似度，但不约束它们的范数：

items.en: where 𝟏1\mathbf{1} denotes a matrix with all elements set to 111. We sweep β𝛽\beta values and select 10−4superscript10410^{-4}, finding this small added penalty sufficient to improve the likelihood that our models will be amenable to truncation. Across runs in Table 1, we observe that without Orthogonal Regularization, only 16% of models are amenable to truncation, compared to 60% when trained with Orthogonal Regularization.
items.zh: 其中 1 表示所有元素都设置为 1 的矩阵。我们扫描 β 值并选择 10^{-4}，发现这个小的附加惩罚足以提高模型对截断的适应性。在表 1 的实验中，我们观察到没有正交正则化时，只有 16% 的模型适合截断，而使用正交正则化训练时，这一比例为 60%。

items.en: We find that current GAN techniques are sufficient to enable scaling to large models and distributed, large-batch training. We find that we can dramatically improve the state of the art and train models up to 512×\times512 resolution without need for explicit multiscale methods like Karras et al. (2018). Despite these improvements, our models undergo training collapse, necessitating early stopping in practice. In the next two sections we investigate why settings which were stable in previous works become unstable when applied at scale.
items.zh: 我们发现当前的 GAN 技术足以支持扩展到大型模型和分布式、大批量训练。我们发现可以显著改进现有技术水平，并训练高达 512×512 分辨率的模型，而无需像 Karras et al. (2018) 那样的显式多尺度方法。尽管有这些改进，我们的模型仍会经历训练崩溃，在实践中需要提前停止。在接下来的两节中，我们将研究为什么在先前工作中稳定的设置在扩展到大规模时变得不稳定。

items.capEn: Figure 3: A typical plot of the first singular value σ0subscript𝜎0\sigma_{0} in the layers of G (a) and D (b) before Spectral Normalization. Most layers in G have well-behaved spectra, but without constraints a small subset grow throughout training and explode at collapse. D’s spectra are noisier but otherwise better-behaved. Colors from red to violet indicate increasing depth.
items.capZh: 图 3：在谱归一化之前，G (a) 和 D (b) 各层中第一个奇异值 σ0 的典型图。G 中的大多数层具有良好行为的谱，但在没有约束的情况下，一小部分层在训练过程中增长并在崩溃时爆炸。D 的谱噪声更大，但其他方面表现更好。颜色从红色到紫色表示深度增加。

items.en: Much previous work has investigated GAN stability from a variety of analytical angles and on toy problems, but the instabilities we observe occur for settings which are stable at small scale, necessitating direct analysis at large scale. We monitor a range of weight, gradient, and loss statistics during training, in search of a metric which might presage the onset of training collapse, similar to (Odena et al., 2018). We found the top three singular values σ0,σ1,σ2subscript𝜎0subscript𝜎1subscript𝜎2\sigma_{0},\sigma_{1},\sigma_{2} of each weight matrix to be the most informative. They can be efficiently computed using the Alrnoldi iteration method (Golub & der Vorst, 2000), which extends the power iteration method, used in Miyato et al. (2018), to estimation of additional singular vectors and values. A clear pattern emerges, as can be seen in Figure 3(a) and Appendix F: most G layers have well-behaved spectral norms, but some layers (typically the first layer in G, which is over-complete and not convolutional) are ill-behaved, with spectral norms that grow throughout training and explode at collapse.
items.zh: 许多先前的工作从各种分析角度和玩具问题上研究了 GAN 的稳定性，但我们观察到的不稳定性发生在小规模稳定的设置中，因此需要在大规模下进行直接分析。我们在训练期间监测一系列权重、梯度和损失统计量，以寻找可能预示训练崩溃开始的指标，类似于 (Odena et al., 2018)。我们发现每个权重矩阵的前三个奇异值 σ0, σ1, σ2 信息量最大。它们可以使用 Arnoldi 迭代方法 (Golub & der Vorst, 2000) 高效计算，该方法将 Miyato et al. (2018) 中使用的幂迭代法扩展到估计额外的奇异向量和值。一个清晰的模式出现了，如图 3(a) 和附录 F 所示：大多数 G 层具有良好行为的谱范数，但某些层（通常是 G 的第一层，它是过完备的且非卷积的）行为不良，其谱范数在训练过程中增长并在崩溃时爆炸。

items.en: To ascertain if this pathology is a cause of collapse or merely a symptom, we study the effects of imposing additional conditioning on G to explicitly counteract spectral explosion. First, we directly regularize the top singular values σ0subscript𝜎0\sigma_{0} of each weight, either towards a fixed value σr​e​gsubscript𝜎𝑟𝑒𝑔\sigma_{reg} or towards some ratio r𝑟r of the second singular value, r⋅s​g​(σ1)⋅𝑟𝑠𝑔subscript𝜎1r\cdot sg(\sigma_{1}) (with s​g𝑠𝑔sg the stop-gradient operation to prevent the regularization from increasing σ1subscript𝜎1\sigma_{1}). Alternatively, we employ a partial singular value decomposition to instead clamp σ0subscript𝜎0\sigma_{0}. Given a weight W𝑊W, its first singular vectors u0subscript𝑢0u_{0} and v0subscript𝑣0v_{0}, and σc​l​a​m​psubscript𝜎𝑐𝑙𝑎𝑚𝑝\sigma_{clamp} the value to which the σ0subscript𝜎0\sigma_{0} will be clamped, our weights become:
items.zh: 为了确定这种病理是崩溃的原因还是仅仅是症状，我们研究了在 G 上施加额外条件以明确对抗谱爆炸的效果。首先，我们直接正则化每个权重的顶部奇异值 σ0，要么朝向固定值 σ_reg，要么朝向第二奇异值的某个比率 r·sg(σ1)（其中 sg 是停止梯度操作，以防止正则化增加 σ1）。或者，我们采用部分奇异值分解来钳制 σ0。给定权重 W，其第一个奇异向量 u0 和 v0，以及 σ_clamp 作为 σ0 将被钳制的值，我们的权重变为：

items.en: where σc​l​a​m​psubscript𝜎𝑐𝑙𝑎𝑚𝑝\sigma_{clamp} is set to either σr​e​gsubscript𝜎𝑟𝑒𝑔\sigma_{reg} or r⋅s​g​(σ1)⋅𝑟𝑠𝑔subscript𝜎1r\cdot sg(\sigma_{1}). We observe that both with and without Spectral Normalization these techniques have the effect of preventing the gradual increase and explosion of either σ0subscript𝜎0\sigma_{0} or σ0σ1subscript𝜎0subscript𝜎1\frac{\sigma_{0}}{\sigma_{1}}, but even though in some cases they mildly improve performance, no combination prevents training collapse. This evidence suggests that while conditioning G might improve stability, it is insufficient to ensure stability. We accordingly turn our attention to D.
items.zh: 其中 σ_clamp 设置为 σ_reg 或 r·sg(σ1)。我们观察到，无论是否使用谱归一化，这些技术都能防止 σ0 或 σ0/σ1 的逐渐增加和爆炸，但即使在某些情况下它们略微提高了性能，也没有任何组合能防止训练崩溃。这一证据表明，虽然条件化 G 可能提高稳定性，但不足以确保稳定性。因此，我们将注意力转向 D。

items.en: As with G, we analyze the spectra of D’s weights to gain insight into its behavior, then seek to stabilize training by imposing additional constraints. Figure 3(b) displays a typical plot of σ0subscript𝜎0\sigma_{0} for D (with further plots in Appendix F). Unlike G, we see that the spectra are noisy, σ0σ1subscript𝜎0subscript𝜎1\frac{\sigma_{0}}{\sigma_{1}} is well-behaved, and the singular values grow throughout training but only jump at collapse, instead of exploding.
items.zh: 与 G 一样，我们分析 D 权重的谱以深入了解其行为，然后通过施加额外约束来寻求稳定训练。图 3(b) 显示了 D 的 σ0 的典型图（更多图见附录 F）。与 G 不同，我们看到谱是嘈杂的，σ0/σ1 行为良好，奇异值在整个训练过程中增长，但仅在崩溃时跳跃，而不是爆炸。

items.en: The spikes in D’s spectra might suggest that it periodically receives very large gradients, but we observe that the Frobenius norms are smooth (Appendix F), suggesting that this effect is primarily concentrated on the top few singular directions. We posit that this noise is a result of optimization through the adversarial training process, where G periodically produces batches which strongly perturb D . If this spectral noise is causally related to instability, a natural counter is to employ gradient penalties, which explicitly regularize changes in D’s Jacobian. We explore the R1subscript𝑅1R_{1} zero-centered gradient penalty from Mescheder et al. (2018):
items.zh: D 谱中的尖峰可能表明它周期性地接收到非常大的梯度，但我们观察到 Frobenius 范数是平滑的（附录 F），表明这种效应主要集中在顶部几个奇异方向上。我们假设这种噪声是对抗训练过程中优化的结果，其中 G 周期性地产生强烈扰动 D 的批次。如果这种谱噪声与不稳定性有因果关系，那么自然的对策是使用梯度惩罚，它明确正则化 D 的雅可比矩阵的变化。我们探索了来自 Mescheder et al. (2018) 的 R1 零中心梯度惩罚：

items.en: With the default suggested γ𝛾\gamma strength of 10, training becomes stable and improves the smoothness and boundedness of spectra in both G and D, but performance severely degrades, resulting in a 45% reduction in IS. Reducing the penalty partially alleviates this degradation, but results in increasingly ill-behaved spectra; even with the penalty strength reduced to 111 (the lowest strength for which sudden collapse does not occur) the IS is reduced by 20%. Repeating this experiment with various strengths of Orthogonal Regularization, DropOut (Srivastava et al., 2014), and L2 (See Appendix I for details), reveals similar behaviors for these regularization strategies: with high enough penalties on D, training stability can be achieved, but at a substantial cost to performance.
items.zh: 使用默认建议的 γ 强度 10，训练变得稳定，并改善了 G 和 D 中谱的平滑性和有界性，但性能严重下降，导致 IS 降低 45%。降低惩罚部分缓解了这种退化，但导致谱行为越来越差；即使将惩罚强度降低到 1（不发生突然崩溃的最低强度），IS 也降低了 20%。使用不同强度的正交正则化、DropOut (Srivastava et al., 2014) 和 L2（详见附录 I）重复此实验，这些正则化策略表现出类似的行为：对 D 施加足够高的惩罚可以实现训练稳定性，但会以性能大幅下降为代价。

items.en: We also observe that D’s loss approaches zero during training, but undergoes a sharp upward jump at collapse (Appendix F). One possible explanation for this behavior is that D is overfitting to the training set, memorizing training examples rather than learning some meaningful boundary between real and generated images. As a simple test for D’s memorization (related to Gulrajani et al. (2017)), we evaluate uncollapsed discriminators on the ImageNet training and validation sets, and measure what percentage of samples are classified as real or generated. While the training accuracy is consistently above 98%, the validation accuracy falls in the range of 50-55%, no better than random guessing (regardless of regularization strategy). This confirms that D is indeed memorizing the training set; we deem this in line with D’s role, which is not explicitly to generalize, but to distill the training data and provide a useful learning signal for G. Additional experiments and discussion are provided in Appendix G.
items.zh: 我们还观察到 D 的损失在训练期间趋近于零，但在崩溃时急剧上升（附录 F）。这种行为的一种可能解释是 D 过拟合训练集，记忆训练样本而不是学习真实图像和生成图像之间的有意义的边界。作为 D 记忆性的简单测试（与 Gulrajani et al. (2017) 相关），我们在 ImageNet 训练集和验证集上评估未崩溃的判别器，并测量样本被分类为真实或生成的百分比。虽然训练准确率始终高于 98%，但验证准确率在 50-55% 范围内，不比随机猜测好（无论正则化策略如何）。这证实了 D 确实在记忆训练集；我们认为这与 D 的角色一致，其目标不是明确地泛化，而是提炼训练数据并为 G 提供有用的学习信号。额外的实验和讨论见附录 G。

items.en: We find that stability does not come solely from G or D, but from their interaction through the adversarial training process. While the symptoms of their poor conditioning can be used to track and identify instability, ensuring reasonable conditioning proves necessary for training but insufficient to prevent eventual training collapse. It is possible to enforce stability by strongly constraining D, but doing so incurs a dramatic cost in performance. With current techniques, better final performance can be achieved by relaxing this conditioning and allowing collapse to occur at the later stages of training, by which time a model is sufficiently trained to achieve good results.
items.zh: 我们发现稳定性并非单独来自 G 或 D，而是来自它们通过对抗训练过程的相互作用。虽然它们条件不良的症状可用于跟踪和识别不稳定性，但确保合理的条件证明是训练所必需的，但不足以防止最终的训练崩溃。通过强烈约束 D 可以强制稳定性，但这样做会带来巨大的性能代价。使用当前技术，可以通过放松这种条件并允许崩溃在训练后期发生来获得更好的最终性能，此时模型已经充分训练以获得良好结果。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Samples from our BigGAN model with truncation threshold 0.5 (a-c) and an example of class leakage in a partially trained model (d).
items.capZh: 图 4：来自我们的 BigGAN 模型，截断阈值为 0.5 (a-c) 以及部分训练模型中类别泄漏的示例 (d)。

items.en: We evaluate our models on ImageNet ILSVRC 2012 (Russakovsky et al., 2015) at 128×\times128, 256×\times256, and 512×\times512 resolutions, employing the settings from Table 1, row 8. The samples generated by our models are presented in Figure 4, with additional samples in Appendix A, and online 222https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1lWC6XEPD0LT5KUnPXeve_kWeY-FxH002. We report IS and FID in Table 2. As our models are able to trade sample variety for quality, it is unclear how best to compare against prior art; we accordingly report values at three settings, with complete curves in Appendix D. First, we report the FID/IS values at the truncation setting which attains the best FID. Second, we report the FID at the truncation setting for which our model’s IS is the same as that attained by the real validation data, reasoning that this is a passable measure of maximum sample variety achieved while still achieving a good level of “objectness.” Third, we report FID at the maximum IS achieved by each model, to demonstrate how much variety must be traded off to maximize quality. In all three cases, our models outperform the previous state-of-the-art IS and FID scores achieved by Miyato et al. (2018) and Zhang et al. (2018).
items.zh: 我们在 ImageNet ILSVRC 2012 (Russakovsky et al., 2015) 上以 128×128、256×256 和 512×512 分辨率评估我们的模型，采用表 1 第 8 行的设置。我们的模型生成的样本如图 4 所示，更多样本见附录 A，以及在线 2https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1lWC6XEPD0LT5KUnPXeve_kWeY-FxH002。我们在表 2 中报告了 IS 和 FID。由于我们的模型能够以样本多样性换取质量，因此如何与先前技术进行比较尚不清楚；因此我们在三种设置下报告值，完整曲线见附录 D。首先，我们报告在获得最佳 FID 的截断设置下的 FID/IS 值。其次，我们报告在模型 IS 与真实验证数据达到相同水平的截断设置下的 FID，认为这是衡量在达到良好“对象性”水平的同时实现的最大样本多样性的可行度量。第三，我们报告每个模型达到最大 IS 时的 FID，以展示为了最大化质量必须牺牲多少多样性。在所有三种情况下，我们的模型都优于 Miyato et al. (2018) 和 Zhang et al. (2018) 先前达到的最先进的 IS 和 FID 分数。

items.en: In addition to the BigGAN model introduced in the first version of the paper and used in the majority of experiments (unless otherwise stated), we also present a 4x deeper model (BigGAN-deep) which uses a different configuration of residual blocks. As can be seen from Table 2, BigGAN-deep substantially outperforms BigGAN across all resolutions and metrics. This confirms that our findings extend to other architectures, and that increased depth leads to improvement in sample quality. Both BigGAN and BigGAN-deep architectures are described in Appendix B.
items.zh: 除了论文第一版中引入并在大多数实验中使用（除非另有说明）的 BigGAN 模型外，我们还提出了一个 4 倍深的模型（BigGAN-deep），它使用了不同的残差块配置。从表 2 可以看出，BigGAN-deep 在所有分辨率和指标上均大幅优于 BigGAN。这证实了我们的发现可扩展到其他架构，并且增加深度可提高样本质量。BigGAN 和 BigGAN-deep 架构均在附录 B 中描述。

items.en: Our observation that D overfits to the training set, coupled with our model’s sample quality, raises the obvious question of whether or not G simply memorizes training points. To test this, we perform class-wise nearest neighbors analysis in pixel space and the feature space of pre-trained classifier networks (Appendix A). In addition, we present both interpolations between samples and class-wise interpolations (where z𝑧z is held constant) in Figures 8 and 9. Our model convincingly interpolates between disparate samples, and the nearest neighbors for its samples are visually distinct, suggesting that our model does not simply memorize training data.
items.zh: 我们观察到 D 过拟合训练集，结合我们模型的样本质量，引发了一个明显的问题：G 是否只是记忆了训练点。为了测试这一点，我们在像素空间和预训练分类器网络的特征空间中执行类级最近邻分析（附录 A）。此外，我们在图 8 和图 9 中展示了样本之间的插值和类级插值（其中 z 保持不变）。我们的模型令人信服地在不同样本之间插值，其样本的最近邻在视觉上是不同的，这表明我们的模型并非简单地记忆训练数据。

items.en: We note that some failure modes of our partially-trained models are distinct from those previously observed. Most previous failures involve local artifacts (Odena et al., 2016), images consisting of texture blobs instead of objects (Salimans et al., 2016), or the canonical mode collapse. We observe class leakage, where images from one class contain properties of another, as exemplified by Figure 4(d). We also find that many classes on ImageNet are more difficult than others for our model; our model is more successful at generating dogs (which make up a large portion of the dataset, and are mostly distinguished by their texture) than crowds (which comprise a small portion of the dataset and have more large-scale structure). Further discussion is available in Appendix A.
items.zh: 我们注意到，部分训练模型的一些失败模式与先前观察到的不同。大多数先前的失败涉及局部伪影 (Odena et al., 2016)、由纹理斑点而非对象组成的图像 (Salimans et al., 2016) 或典型的模式崩溃。我们观察到类别泄漏，即来自一个类别的图像包含另一个类别的属性，如图 4(d) 所示。我们还发现，ImageNet 上的许多类别对我们的模型来说比其他类别更难；我们的模型在生成狗（占数据集的大部分，且主要通过纹理区分）方面比生成人群（占数据集的一小部分，且具有更多大尺度结构）更成功。进一步讨论见附录 A。

items.en: To confirm that our design choices are effective for even larger and more complex and diverse datasets, we also present results of our system on a subset of JFT-300M (Sun et al., 2017). The full JFT-300M dataset contains 300M real-world images labeled with 18K categories. Since the category distribution is heavily long-tailed, we subsample the dataset to keep only images with the 8.5K most common labels. The resulting dataset contains 292M images – two orders of magnitude larger than ImageNet. For images with multiple labels, we sample a single label randomly and independently whenever an image is sampled. To compute IS and FID for the GANs trained on this dataset, we use an Inception v2 classifier (Szegedy et al., 2016) trained on this dataset. Quantitative results are presented in Table 3. All models are trained with batch size 2048. We compare an ablated version of our model – comparable to SA-GAN (Zhang et al., 2018) but with the larger batch size – against a “full” BigGAN model that makes uses of all of the techniques applied to obtain the best results on ImageNet (shared embedding, skip-z𝑧z, and orthogonal regularization). Our results show that these techniques substantially improve performance even in the setting of this much larger dataset at the same model capacity (64 base channels). We further show that for a dataset of this scale, we see significant additional improvements from expanding the capacity of our models to 128 base channels, while for ImageNet GANs that additional capacity was not beneficial.
items.zh: 为了确认我们的设计选择对更大、更复杂和更多样化的数据集同样有效，我们还展示了系统在JFT-300M子集上的结果（Sun等人，2017）。完整的JFT-300M数据集包含3亿张真实世界图像，标注了1.8万个类别。由于类别分布严重长尾，我们对数据集进行了子采样，仅保留具有8.5K最常见标签的图像。结果数据集包含2.92亿张图像——比ImageNet大两个数量级。对于具有多个标签的图像，我们在每次采样图像时随机独立地采样单个标签。为了计算在此数据集上训练的GAN的IS和FID，我们使用了在此数据集上训练的Inception v2分类器（Szegedy等人，2016）。定量结果见表3。所有模型均以批量大小2048进行训练。我们将模型的消融版本（与SA-GAN相当（Zhang等人，2018），但批量大小更大）与使用所有在ImageNet上获得最佳结果的技术（共享嵌入、skip-z和正交正则化）的“完整”BigGAN模型进行比较。我们的结果表明，即使在相同模型容量（64个基础通道）下，这些技术也能显著提高性能。我们进一步表明，对于这种规模的数据集，将模型容量扩展到128个基础通道会带来显著的额外改进，而对于ImageNet GAN，这种额外容量并无益处。

items.en: In Figure 19 (Appendix D), we present truncation plots for models trained on this dataset. Unlike for ImageNet, where truncation limits of σ≈0𝜎0\sigma\approx 0 tend to produce the highest fidelity scores, IS is typically maximized for our JFT-300M models when the truncation value σ𝜎\sigma ranges from 0.5 to 1. We suspect that this is at least partially due to the intra-class variability of JFT-300M labels, as well as the relative complexity of the image distribution, which includes images with multiple objects at a variety of scales. Interestingly, unlike models trained on ImageNet, where training tends to collapse without heavy regularization (Section 4), the models trained on JFT-300M remain stable over many hundreds of thousands of iterations. This suggests that moving beyond ImageNet to larger datasets may partially alleviate GAN stability issues.
items.zh: 在图19（附录D）中，我们展示了在此数据集上训练的模型的截断图。与ImageNet不同，在ImageNet中，截断限制σ≈0往往产生最高的保真度分数，而对于我们的JFT-300M模型，当截断值σ在0.5到1之间时，IS通常最大化。我们怀疑这至少部分是由于JFT-300M标签的类内变异性，以及图像分布的相对复杂性，其中包括具有不同尺度多个对象的图像。有趣的是，与在ImageNet上训练的模型不同（这些模型在没有强正则化的情况下容易崩溃，第4节），在JFT-300M上训练的模型在数十万次迭代中保持稳定。这表明，从ImageNet转向更大的数据集可能部分缓解GAN的稳定性问题。

items.en: The improvement over the baseline GAN model that we achieve on this dataset without changes to the underlying models or training and regularization techniques (beyond expanded capacity) demonstrates that our findings extend from ImageNet to datasets with scale and complexity thus far unprecedented for generative models of images.
items.zh: 我们在该数据集上相对于基线GAN模型取得的改进（无需改变底层模型或训练和正则化技术，仅扩展容量）表明，我们的发现从ImageNet扩展到具有迄今为止图像生成模型前所未有的规模和复杂性的数据集。

items.en: We have demonstrated that Generative Adversarial Networks trained to model natural images of multiple categories highly benefit from scaling up, both in terms of fidelity and variety of the generated samples. As a result, our models set a new level of performance among ImageNet GAN models, improving on the state of the art by a large margin. We have also presented an analysis of the training behavior of large scale GANs, characterized their stability in terms of the singular values of their weights, and discussed the interplay between stability and performance.
items.zh: 我们已经证明，训练用于建模多类别自然图像的生成对抗网络在扩展规模时高度受益，无论是在生成样本的保真度还是多样性方面。因此，我们的模型在ImageNet GAN模型中树立了新的性能水平，大幅改进了现有技术水平。我们还对大规模GAN的训练行为进行了分析，根据其权重的奇异值表征了其稳定性，并讨论了稳定性与性能之间的相互作用。

items.en: We would like to thank Kai Arulkumaran, Matthias Bauer, Peter Buchlovsky, Jeffrey Defauw, Sander Dieleman, Ian Goodfellow, Ariel Gordon, Karol Gregor, Dominik Grewe, Chris Jones, Jacob Menick, Augustus Odena, Suman Ravuri, Ali Razavi, Mihaela Rosca, and Jeff Stanway.
items.zh: 我们要感谢Kai Arulkumaran、Matthias Bauer、Peter Buchlovsky、Jeffrey Defauw、Sander Dieleman、Ian Goodfellow、Ariel Gordon、Karol Gregor、Dominik Grewe、Chris Jones、Jacob Menick、Augustus Odena、Suman Ravuri、Ali Razavi、Mihaela Rosca和Jeff Stanway。
